title: VillagerTradesEdit
description: Serverside utility mod for editing villager trades
body: --- ## 💎 Villager Trade Editor Creating custom trades with villagers is already possible in vanilla but the process involves heavy use of very lengthy commands and is not very practical. Also editing trades of existing villagers is even more cumbersome This serverside mod alleviates it by providing an intuitive gui to work with. To edit the trades of an villager by using the command `/villagertrades edit ` with `` being the villager you want to edit. ![](https://imgur.com/xXu7b8N.png) One further feature this mod provides is allowing a trade to be **infinitely** in stock. Clicking on the green glass pane allows you to edit a trades metadata. This mod does **not** add any trades or anything! It is intended to edit trades and create custom villagers.
